Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft'S Answer To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, Set One.;Statement Of Question Adn Answers In Dispute
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Defendant Gabriel Lasa To Respond To Plaintiffs' Special Interrogatories, Set One, is denied. Supplemental responses have been served. As to No. 104, it was not a part of the motion until the reply. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Counsel is reminded of Local Rule 10(C)(1) which requires that discovery motions be calendared with the clerk in the Discovery Department. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
